gauge.name: Roaring Fork River at Glenwood Springs

impacts.statement: Flood waters are receding from the Glenwood Springs Elementary School on right bank across from gage site.
Flooding starts at the Glenwood Springs Elementary School on right bank across from gage site.
Water reaches Automotive Shop on Right Bank across from the gage site.  Devastating flooding is occurring.
Water is receding from the Automotive Shop on Right Bank across from the gage site.  Devastating flooding has occurred.
Water reaches the foundation of house on left bank closest to the downstream side of the bridge.
Water is receding from the foundation of house on left bank closest to the downstream side of the bridge.
Water covers the road on the West 8th Street bridge.
River water is receding from the road surface on the West 8th Street bridge.
Water is receding from the foundation of second house on left bank downstream of bridge.
Water reaches foundation of second house on left bank downstream of bridge.
Water is receding from the foundation of the second house on left bank downstream of bridge.
Water reaches foundation of Farnum Holt Funeral Home on right bank downstream of West 8th Street bridge.
Water reaches the bottom of the West 8th Street bridge.  Water is approaching the foundations of homes along the left and right banks downstream from the bridge.
Water is receding from the bottom of the West 8th Street bridge.  Water is receding from the foundations of homes along the left and right banks downstream from the bridge.
Water reaches building in back of Glenwood Springs Baptist Church lot. Major flood damage has occurred in River Meadows Mobile Home Park.
Water reaches building in back of Glenwood Springs Baptist Church lot. Major flood damage has occurred in River Meadows Mobile Home Park.  Waters are receding.

Water is at the foundation of the Glenwood Springs Baptist Church, located on the right bank just upstream of the West 8th Street bridge. Major flooding is occurring in the River Meadows Mobile Home Park. Gage site is likely destroyed.  Waters are receding.

Water reaches the foundation of the Glenwood Springs Baptist Church, located on the right bank just upstream of the West 8th Street bridge. Major flooding is occurring in the River Meadows Mobile Home Park. Gage site is likely destroyed.

Water is receding from the lower portion of the bike path on the right bank near the 8th Street bridge. Lower portions of lawns on left bank downstream from bridge flooded. Low lying portions of the River Meadows Mobile Home Park are flooded.

Lower portion of the bike path on the right bank near the 8th Street bridge begins to flood. Lower portions of lawns on left bank downstream from bridge flooded. Low lying portions of the River Meadows Mobile Home Park are flooded.
Minor flooding of the River Meadows Mobile Home Park is occurring. The lower level of Veltus Park is flooding including the lower parking lot and the picnic pavilion.  The river gage site is flooded.

Minor flooding of the River Meadows Mobile Home Park is occurring. The lower level of Veltus Park is flooding including the lower parking lot and the picnic pavilion.  The river gage site is flooding.
River reaches top of bank in Veltus Park and in Rivers Meadows Mobile Home Park.
River is at top of bank in Veltus Park and in Rivers Meadows Mobile Home Park.
Water is receding from the Veltus Park observation peninsula protruding into the Roaring Fork River on the left bank just above the gage site.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Gauge reading may be affected by ice. Forecast flows are unadjusted for ice.

value.label: North American Vertical Datum of 1988
value.description: A fixed reference for elevations determined by geodetic leveling. The datum was derived from a general adjustment of the first-order terrestrial leveling nets of the United States, Canada, and Mexico. In the adjustment, only the height of the primary tidal bench mark, referenced to the International Great Lakes Datum of 1985 (IGLD 85) local mean sea level height value, at Father Point, Rimouski, Quebec, Canada was held fixed, thus providing minimum constraint. NAVD 88 and IGLD 85 are identical. However, NAVD 88 bench mark values are given in Helmert orthometric height units while IGLD 85 values are in dynamic heights. See International Great Lakes Datum of 1985, National Geodetic Vertical Datum of 1929, and geopotential difference. NAVD 88 should not be used as Mean Sea Level.
